metadata.description: Public Agent Skills — turn ideas into actionable agent workflows (architecture, tooling, and more).

plugins.name: kapil-agent-skills
plugins.description: Skills from github.com/kapilraghuwanshi/skills. Currently includes Idea → Architecture: one-line product ideas → justified multi-layer architecture (frontend, backend, AI/agents, infra, security), NFR profile, decision log, diagram guidance, and cost ballpark. Install once for the whole bundle.
